confirmed_issues.description: Missing trailing comma in pipeline-watcher.js line 1542 causes Prettier/ESLint error.
confirmed_issues.root_cause: A log() call inside an async block in scripts/pipeline-watcher.js line 1542 is missing the trailing comma required by the project's Prettier config.
confirmed_issues.proposed_fix: Insert trailing comma at end of the string literal on line 1542.

migration_blockers.description: 72-hour stability soak window open since 2026-05-22. Required before Phase 3 gate closes.
NAS100/US30 not added to EA Properties → Inputs → Symbols. Code handles them correctly; this is a trader-side config item only.

notes: X-EA-API-Key read via get_ea_api_key() accepting all 4 header aliases
SMC_SF_EA_API_KEY read from PHP constant with getenv() fallback
is_finite() + > 0 + bid <= ask guard on snapshot insert
quote_time and timestamp both accepted; quote_time takes precedence
OHLC: high >= max(open,close), low <= min(open,close) enforced
tick_volume: negative clamped to 0; non-numeric clamped to 0
candles[] array promoted to candle object (candles[0]); tick_volume → volume mapped
FreshnessBadge.tsx reads state from backend — no local derivation
STYLES lookup has fallback to 'stale' for unknown states — no crash
useSniperData.ts polls backend; no local live-state injection
useSnapshot() and useLiveSignals() gates: backendReady AND pollMs !== null
useEngineHealth() has staleTime:0 — always reflects backend state
Stale candle guard in insert_mt5_candle() — 180s max age
Signal engine runs only after fresh data confirmed by backend
Frontend does not override backend signal truth
Dashboard verdict flows from backend snapshot only
MT5 EA → POST /ea/market-stream → permission_ea_market_stream → post_ea_market_stream → class-market-data-service.php → signal engine → GET /snapshot → sniperClient.ts → useSnapshot → React render
No broken consumers or producers detected
sniperClient.ts call() function attaches X-WP-Nonce / Basic auth via getAuthHeader()
EA route uses separate X-EA-API-Key — no cookie/session dependency
TD rate-limit transients cleared on every MT5 push
Engine heartbeat row written on each EA push
EA market stream: test-ea-market-stream.php — 14/14 tests PASS

migration_blockers_status.phase_3: IN-PROGRESS — 72h soak open since 2026-05-22; NAS100/US30 config item (non-blocking)
